raw_request: Obtain the authoritative controlling-registry record for Northstar's permit, including whether the controlling permit exists and its current status.
intent: The policy requires the controlling permit to be ACTIVE; an absent, inactive, or unresolved controlling authorization requires escalation.
requested_scope: Northstar; controlling permit only; authoritative registry; current existence and status.
expected_value_basis: An ACTIVE result would justify spending remaining budget to verify current insurance, while an absent or inactive result would make escalation decision-sufficient.
